title: Direct ELISA for investigating the binding of  chemically-made Protein-LAG-anti-IgY-peroxidase  to both avian and mammalian immunoglobulins.
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9sl1v","text":"Peroxidase-labeled-protein-LAG-anti-IgY conjugate is chemically made. It has unique binding properties. It binds to both avian and mammalian immunoglobulins. It can be used as a reagent in ELISA, Western blotting and dot blot for immunodetection of immunoglobulins and antigens. It may be used to make the immunodiagnosis of infectious diseases involving laboratory, wild, zoo, and farm animals [1].","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"12l40","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"22bcb","text":"References","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"agcjl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bff7k","text":"1.Vaillant AJ, McFarlane-Andersonv N, Wisdom B, Mohammed W, Vuma S, et al. steps: This ELISA is used to study the interaction of protein-LAG-anti-IgY-HRP (SpLAG-anti-IgY-HRP) with diverse immunoglobulins.

The 96 well microtitre plate is coated overnight at 4°C with 1 µg/µl per well of purified immunoglobulins, 50 µl of any animal sera, or 50 µl of water soluble fraction from egg yolks in carbonate-bicarbonate buffer pH 9.6.
Then plate is treated with bovine serum albumin solution and washed 4X with PBS-Tween.

Then 50 µl of peroxidase-labeled-protein-LAG-anti-IgY conjugate diluted 1:5000 in PBS-non-fat milk is added to each well and incubated for 1.30h at RT. After that the plate is washed 4X with PBS-Tween.
Pipette 50 μl of 3,3',5,5' - tetramethylbenzidine (TMB; Sigma-Aldrich) to each well.
The reaction is stopped with 50 µl of 3M H2SO4 solution.
The plate is visually assessed for the development of colour and read in a microplate reader at 450 nm.
A cut-off point should be calculated as the mean of the optical density of negative controls x 2 SD.
creator: Angel A Justiz-Vaillant
